full_text:
Cheng Xi (Shenbo) 程喜 (申伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Xi (程喜), styledShenbo (申伯). Due to his own military errors, slandered Tian Yu to shield himself. Cheng Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
